plan_type_rationale: Two-phase: audit-only Phase 1 with hard stop, then deletion Phase 2 gated on audit.

phases.name: Audit — inventory element-grain paths outside the analyzer
phases.gate: audit-matrix.md committed; agent reports to ORCHESTRATOR for Phase 2 approval

tasks.description: Read src/pipeline/output-validator.ts in full. Identify every loop or aggregation that iterates state.elements (element-grain) to derive file-grain outputs.
tasks.success_criteria: List of element-grain aggregation sites with line numbers and purpose.

tasks.description: Read src/pipeline/graph-builder.ts lines around 'file-grain pseudo-nodes'. Confirm graph.json nodes carry file-grain headerStatus directly.
tasks.success_criteria: Confirmed: graph.json file-grain nodes carry headerStatus. File-grain data is available without element iteration.

tasks.description: Check all other files outside src/analyzer/ that reference 'element-grain', 'elementGrain', or iterate state.elements for aggregation purposes.
tasks.success_criteria: Complete inventory: files + line numbers + purpose of each element-grain aggregation site outside the analyzer.

tasks.description: Confirm skip-count paths in indexing-orchestrator.ts (chunksSkipped, chunksSkippedDetails) are chunk-grain not element-grain. These are NOT in scope.
tasks.success_criteria: Confirmed chunk-grain; no action needed in Phase 2.

tasks.description: Author audit-matrix.md at coderef/workorder/rag-index-two-grain-drop/audit-matrix.md. Table: file | line(s) | symbol | grain-type | replacement-source | delete-or-keep | rationale.
tasks.success_criteria: audit-matrix.md exists with one row per aggregation site found in 1.1–1.3.

tasks.description: Commit audit-matrix.md. Message: 'audit(WO-RAG-INDEX-TWO-GRAIN-DROP-001) Phase 1: element-grain path inventory'
tasks.success_criteria: Commit hash recorded. Phase 1 hard stop satisfied.

tasks.description: Hard stop. Report Phase 1 findings to ORCHESTRATOR. Wait for Phase 2 approval before proceeding.
tasks.success_criteria: Report delivered. Status set to phase_1_complete in communication.json.

phases.name: Deletion — replace element-grain paths with file-grain sources
phases.gate: Phase 2 approved by ORCHESTRATOR after Phase 1 report

tasks.description: In src/pipeline/output-validator.ts: replace buildFileHeaderStatusMap's state.elements iteration with graph-node iteration (file-grain nodes from graph.json). Keep function signature and return type identical.
tasks.success_criteria: buildFileHeaderStatusMap now iterates graph nodes, not state.elements. No signature change.

tasks.description: In src/pipeline/output-validator.ts: replace any other element-grain aggregation sites identified in Phase 1 audit-matrix. For each: use file-grain source as documented in audit-matrix replacement-source column.
tasks.success_criteria: All audit-matrix rows marked 'delete' have been replaced. No remaining element-grain iteration outside the analyzer.

tasks.description: Run full test suite: npx jest (or equivalent). All 239 tests must PASS.
tasks.success_criteria: Exit 0, 239/239 PASS (or higher if new tests were added).

tasks.description: Run frozen-fixture invariant tests: AC-05a and AC-05b. Confirm 2415===2415 (element-grain) and 263===263 (file-grain).
Run tsc clean: npx tsc --noEmit (tsconfig.json) and npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.build.json.
Commit all changes. Message: 'refactor(WO-RAG-INDEX-TWO-GRAIN-DROP-001) Phase 2: delete element-grain paths outside analyzer'
